info.description: One entry per coaching offer or 1:1 session (The Reset, Signal, Founder Reset, etc.). The slug must match the URL path.

title.description: Programme name as it appears on the page (e.g. 'The Reset.' or 'Founder Reset').

slug.description: URL slug. Must match the route — e.g. 'the-reset', 'signal', 'founder-reset'. Strapi auto-generates from title but you can edit.

tagline.description: Short italic line under the title. One sentence.

accentColour.description: Brand colour hex. Common options: pink #F280AA, blue #7BAFDD, gold #FAA21B, mint #5DCAA5, plum #6E3A5A.

heroImage.description: Image at the top of the programme page. Portrait orientation works best.

intro.description: Main body. Separate paragraphs with a BLANK LINE between them. Each blank line creates a new paragraph on the page.

whatsIncludedItems.description: One bullet per line. Each line becomes a separate bullet point.

approachLabel.description: Optional — heading for a second info section.

outcomesLabel.description: Optional — heading for a third info section.

pricingBody.description: Pricing details. e.g. '£1,500. Paid in full or two instalments of £750.'

ctaUrl.description: Where the bottom button links to. Paste your Calendly link here (e.g. https://calendly.com/anna-annalouoflondon/discovery-call) and it will open as a popup so the customer stays on the site. Any other URL opens normally.

displayOrder.description: Lower numbers show first in any list. Default 100.

stagesList.description: Optional. For programmes shown as 3+ stages (Recovery / Untangle-Unbind-Unbound). One stage per line. Format: 'Label|Title|Body description'. Example: 'Month One|Untangle.|We identify where the patterns live in the body.'. Leave blank if not needed.

pricePence.description: Optional. Price in pence (e.g. 150000 = £1,500). Leave 0 or blank for 'by enquiry' programmes — the Book button won't show a price button.

isRecurring.description: Tick only if billed monthly/yearly. Leave unchecked for one-off programme payment.

mailchimpTag.description: Tag attached on successful payment. Must match a Mailchimp tag name EXACTLY (case-sensitive). Examples: 'The Reset (6-week)', 'Signal (12-week)', 'Signal & Build (founders)'.

grantsResetRoomAccess.description: Leave OFF for normal programmes. Only the Reset Room membership should have this on.

grantsRegulatedAccess.description: Turn ON for the REGULATED programme entry only. When ticked, a Stripe purchase grants the buyer access to the course at /the-work/regulated/access. Leave OFF for every other programme.

seoTitle.description: Optional SEO override. Leave blank to use the title.

seoDescription.description: Optional SEO description for Google. Keep under 160 characters.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this programme page. Anna's 8 Jun mapping: each page points the reader to the most relevant next offerings. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely (use this for B2B pages like Corporate Workshops).
